import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
let n = list.len(lines)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    if i == n - 1 and string.is_empty(line)
      i = i
    else
      println("[#{i}] #{line}")
    end
  when None
    i = i
  end
  i = i + 1
end
